sigWerErrors.reason: The substitution changes the introductory phrase 'bir dakika' (one moment) to a name, which omits the polite attention-getting phrase and changes the tone and meaning of the sentence.
Omitting 'ismimde' (in my name) removes important information about what is being discussed, which can confuse the listener about the subject of the sentence.
Omitting 'de' (also/as well) slightly affects the flow but does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence.
